## Checklist

- [ ] Title is one short imperative sentence
- [ ] One topic per PR (refactors / bug-fixes split into separate PRs)
- [ ] Touched Python files all parse (`python -c "import ast; ast.parse(...)"`)
- [ ] If new env var: documented in `docs/CONFIG.md`
- [ ] If new CLI flag: `--help` text updated and `README.md` reflects it
- [ ] If touching scoring / query generation: before/after
